tests.description: Power-on state is LANGUAGE_SELECT
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §2.1 — Language Selection (first screen on power-on)

tests.description: LANGUAGE_SELECT → DRUG_SELECT on selectLanguage()
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §2.1 — "Select language, pump advances to Drug Select screen"

tests.description: Selecting a non-weight drug transitions to RATE_ENTRY
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §2.3 — Drug selection workflow; CLAUDE.md §6.2 DRUG_SELECT → RATE_ENTRY

tests.description: Selecting a weight-based drug transitions to WEIGHT_ENTRY
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §2.3 — "Weight-based drugs require patient weight confirmation first"

tests.description: Double chevron (»») increases rateBuffer by STEP_LARGE (10)
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §3.1 Table 1 — "Double chevron: faster increase of values"; FACTORY_DEFAULTS.STEP_LARGE = 10

tests.description: Single chevron (») increases rateBuffer by STEP_SMALL (1)
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §3.1 Table 1 — "Single chevron: slower increase of values"; FACTORY_DEFAULTS.STEP_SMALL = 1

tests.description: Rate clamps at RATE_MAX (1200 ml/h) and logs boundary_hit
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §4 Factory Defaults — "Infusion Rate Max 1200 ml/h"; CLAUDE.md §6.3 Boundary Clamping

tests.description: Rate clamps at RATE_MIN (0.1 ml/h) and logs boundary_hit
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §4 Factory Defaults — "Infusion Rate Min 0.1 ml/h"; CLAUDE.md §6.3 Boundary Clamping

tests.description: Rate above soft limit triggers GUARDRAIL_WARNING screen on RUN
tests.dfuRef: BDDF §4 — "Soft limit exceeded: pump stops, warning displayed, nurse must override or re-enter"

tests.description: Rate above hard limit triggers GUARDRAIL_BLOCKED screen on RUN
tests.dfuRef: BDDF §4 — "Hard limit exceeded: pump blocked, nurse must re-enter (no override)"

tests.description: Rate within soft limits transitions to RUNNING on RUN
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §2.4 — "Press RUN; pump starts infusion"; CLAUDE.md §6.2 RATE_ENTRY → RUNNING

tests.description: Guardrail override transitions to RUNNING and logs guardrail_override
tests.dfuRef: BDDF §4 — "OVERRIDE softkey: nurse accepts responsibility, infusion starts"; CLAUDE.md Rule 7 — must always log

tests.description: RE-ENTER from GUARDRAIL_WARNING returns to RATE_ENTRY
tests.dfuRef: BDDF §4 — "RE-ENTER softkey: nurse cancels and reprograms rate"

tests.description: RE-ENTER from GUARDRAIL_BLOCKED returns to RATE_ENTRY (only option)
tests.dfuRef: BDDF §4 — "Hard limit: only RE-ENTER is permitted, no override possible"

tests.description: RUNNING → ON_HOLD on pressHold()
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §3.1 — "HOLD button: Put infusion on hold; amber LED lit"

tests.description: ON_HOLD → RUNNING on pressRun()
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §3.1 — "Press RUN from hold to resume infusion"

tests.description: Direction reversal during rate entry logs a correction event
tests.dfuRef: CLAUDE.md §6.3 — "Detect correction: find last rate_adjust and check direction reversal"
tests.expected: second adjustChevron (opposite sign) produces a correction log entry

tests.description: confirmVtbi() sets vtbi on state and transitions to RATE_ENTRY
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §2.4 — "VTBI softkey: set volume to be infused"; CLAUDE.md §6.2 VTBI_ENTRY → RATE_ENTRY

tests.description: INFUSION_COMPLETE alarm fires when volumeInfused reaches VTBI
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §7.2 — "INFUSION_COMPLETE: volumeInfused >= vtbi"

tests.description: Rate drops to KVO_RATE (1.0 ml/h) after INFUSION_COMPLETE
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §4 — "KVO Rate 1.0 ml/h — runs after VTBI complete"

tests.description: OCCLUSION alarm priority is higher than AIR_IN_LINE in same tick
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §7.2 — alarm priority: "OCCLUSION > AIR_IN_LINE > BATTERY_LOW > INFUSION_COMPLETE"
tests.expected: alarmType === "OCCLUSION" when pressureLevel ≥ 7 and volume near 500 ml

tests.description: silenceAlarm() from ALARM with kvoActive=true resumes at RUNNING (KVO continues)
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §7.2 — "KVO: running at KVO rate after VTBI complete"

tests.description: silenceAlarm() from ALARM with kvoActive=false transitions to ON_HOLD
tests.dfuRef: 1000DF §7.2 — "Critical alarms: press SILENCE softkey → ON HOLD"

tests.description: MANUAL mode bypasses guardrails — any rate in [RATE_MIN, RATE_MAX] starts infusion
tests.dfuRef: BDDF §4 — "MANUAL mode: drug library bypassed, no guardrails apply"
tests.expected: screen === "RUNNING" with MANUAL drug at 500 ml/h (above any drug soft limit)

tests.description: pressHold() is a no-op when pump is not in RUNNING state
tests.dfuRef: CLAUDE.md §6.2 — "RUNNING → ON_HOLD (HOLD button)" — transition only valid from RUNNING
tests.expected: screen unchanged when pressHold called from RATE_ENTRY

tests.description: Power-on state is STARTUP (self-test), not LANGUAGE_SELECT
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU §Startup sequence — "Device performs self-test on power-on"

tests.description: STARTUP → DRUG_SELECT on completeBoot()
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU §Power-on — "Self-test complete: pump advances to drug selection"

tests.description: Rate in advisory zone (within 20% of softMax) triggers GUARDRAIL_ADVISORY on RUN
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU "Clinical Advisories" tier — rate within 20% of soft limit boundary; BRAUN_DEFAULTS.ADVISORY_ZONE_FRACTION = 0.20

tests.description: Rate exceeding soft limit triggers GUARDRAIL_WARNING (Soft Stop) on RUN
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU "Soft Stop" tier — "Rate exceeds programmed soft limit; nurse must override or re-enter"

tests.description: Rate exceeding hard limit triggers GUARDRAIL_BLOCKED (Hard Stop) on RUN
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU "Hard Stop" tier — "Rate exceeds hard limit; only RE-ENTER permitted"

tests.description: Acknowledging advisory notice transitions to RUNNING and logs event
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU "Clinical Advisories" — "Nurse acknowledges to continue; infusion starts automatically"

tests.description: Advisory zone boundary is exactly 20% of soft limit (ADVISORY_ZONE_FRACTION=0.20)
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU "Clinical Advisories"; BRAUN_DEFAULTS.ADVISORY_ZONE_FRACTION = 0.20
tests.expected: rate=8.0 (exactly at threshold) → NOT advisory; rate=8.1 → advisory

tests.description: Bolus volume is clamped at BOLUS_MAX_ML = 2.0 ml (vs Alaris GP 5.0 ml)
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU Bolus section — "Bolus Volume Max 2 ml"; BRAUN_DEFAULTS.BOLUS_MAX_ML = 2.0
tests.expected: bolusVolumeDelivered clamped to 2.0 ml when 3.0 ml was accumulated

tests.description: Connecting SpaceCom2 sets spacecom2Connected=true and logs spacecom2_connected
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun SpaceCom2 module docs; CISA ICSMA-21-294-01 — CVE-2021-33882 attack surface (networked device)

tests.description: Disconnecting SpaceCom2 sets spacecom2Connected=false and logs spacecom2_disconnected
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun SpaceCom2 module docs — disconnected pump cannot receive drug library updates

tests.description: RUNNING → ON_HOLD on pressHold()
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU §HOLD button — "Suspends infusion, amber LED lit"

tests.description: ON_HOLD → RUNNING on pressRun_fromHold()
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU §RUN button from hold — "Resumes infusion at programmed rate"

tests.description: INFUSION_COMPLETE alarm fires when volumeInfused reaches VTBI
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU §VTBI — "Alarm sounds when programmed volume is delivered"

tests.description: KVO rate = 1.0 ml/h after INFUSION_COMPLETE (same as Alaris GP)
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU — "KVO rate 1 ml/h"; BRAUN_DEFAULTS.KVO_RATE = 1.0

tests.description: Rate is edited directly in state.rate (no separate rateBuffer field)
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun Infusomat Space IFU — rate entry model; braunStateMachine.ts design note §6
tests.expected: adjustChevron updates state.rate directly; no rateBuffer property in BraunPumpState

tests.description: firmwareSigned = false by design on all Infusomat Space devices
tests.dfuRef: CISA ICSMA-21-294-01 — CVE-2021-33885 (CVSS 9.0): firmware update protocol lacks cryptographic signature verification
tests.expected: BRAUN_DEFAULTS.FIRMWARE_SIGNED === false; initial state firmwareSigned === false

tests.description: MANUAL mode bypasses all three guardrail tiers — infusion starts immediately
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU — "MANUAL mode: drug library not consulted, no guardrail limits apply"
tests.expected: screen === "RUNNING" with MANUAL drug at 500 ml/h

tests.description: confirmVtbi() sets vtbi and vtbiSet=true, returns to RATE_ENTRY
tests.dfuRef: B. Braun IFU §VTBI programming — "VTBI confirmed: pump stores volume, returns to rate screen"

tests.description: Power-on state is RATE_ENTRY (no language or startup screen)
tests.dfuRef: Graseby 3100 Operators Manual §Operating Sequence — "Power on: device ready for rate entry"

tests.description: No guardrails — pressStart() at any valid rate transitions to RUNNING
tests.dfuRef: Graseby 3100 Operators Manual — no guardrail section exists; NPSA Alert 2010: "Absence of dose error prevention"
tests.expected: screen === "RUNNING" at rate=150 ml/h (above any clinical soft limit) — no warning or block

tests.description: pressStart() with rate = 0 is rejected — infusion cannot start
tests.dfuRef: Graseby 3100 Operators Manual §Operating Sequence — "Rate must be set before starting"

tests.description: Rate maximum is 199.9 ml/h (syringe driver spec; LVPs reach 1200 ml/h)
tests.dfuRef: Graseby 3100 Operators Manual §Specifications — "Maximum rate 199.9 ml/h"; GRASEBY_DEFAULTS.RATE_MAX = 199.9
tests.expected: GRASEBY_DEFAULTS.RATE_MAX === 199.9; adjustRate past max logs boundary_hit

tests.description: SYRINGE_EMPTY alarm fires when volumeInfused reaches syringeCapacityMl
tests.dfuRef: Graseby 3100 Operators Manual §Alarms — "Syringe empty alarm: audible tone + LED"

tests.description: No drug library — state has no drug selection step or selectedDrug field
tests.dfuRef: Graseby 3100 Operators Manual — "Rate entry in ml/h only; no drug-based programming"
tests.expected: GrasebyPumpState has no selectedDrug, selectedDrugId, or drugLibraryUsed fields

tests.description: No VTBI field — syringe capacity is the only volume constraint
tests.dfuRef: Graseby 3100 Operators Manual — "No VTBI; infusion runs until syringe empty"
tests.expected: GrasebyPumpState has syringeCapacityMl but no vtbi field

tests.description: No bolus mode — state has no bolusActive or bolusVolume fields
tests.dfuRef: Graseby 3100 Operators Manual — "No bolus function on syringe driver"
tests.expected: GrasebyPumpState has no bolusActive or bolusVolumeDelivered fields

tests.description: RUNNING → ON_HOLD on pressStop()
tests.dfuRef: Graseby 3100 Operators Manual §STOP button — "Suspends infusion"

tests.description: ON_HOLD → RATE_ENTRY on pressReprogram() for rate change
tests.dfuRef: Graseby 3100 Operators Manual §Reprogramming — "Return to rate entry from hold"

tests.description: Guardrail tier count: Alaris GP = 2 tiers, B. Braun = 3 tiers, Graseby = 0 tiers
tests.dfuRef: BDDF §4 (2-tier); B. Braun IFU §Advisories/Soft Stop/Hard Stop (3-tier); Graseby Manual (no guardrails); NPSA 2010
tests.expected: Alaris GP: warning+blocked (2), B. Braun: advisory+warning+blocked (3), Graseby: none (0)
tests.actual: Alaris tiers=2 ✓, B.Braun tiers=3 ✓, Graseby tiers=0 ✓ → all correct=true

tests.description: Bolus maximum: Alaris GP = 5.0 ml, B. Braun = 2.0 ml, Graseby = N/A (no bolus)
tests.dfuRef: Alaris GP 1000DF §4 "Bolus Volume Max 5 ml"; B. Braun IFU "Bolus Volume Max 2 ml"; Graseby Manual (no bolus mode)
tests.expected: FACTORY_DEFAULTS.BOLUS_VOLUME_MAX=5, BRAUN_DEFAULTS.BOLUS_MAX_ML=2, Graseby state has no bolusActive field
tests.actual: Alaris BOLUS_MAX=5 ml, B.Braun BOLUS_MAX=2 ml, Graseby no bolus=true

tests.description: All three devices share the same chevron step sizes: STEP_LARGE=10, STEP_SMALL=1
tests.dfuRef: Alaris GP 1000DF §3.1; B. Braun IFU §Rate entry; Graseby Manual §Rate entry — all describe ×10 and ×1 increments

tests.description: Rate maximum: Alaris GP = B. Braun = 1200 ml/h (LVPs); Graseby = 199.9 ml/h (syringe driver)
tests.dfuRef: Alaris GP 1000DF §4; B. Braun IFU §Specifications (both 1200 ml/h); Graseby Manual §Specifications (199.9 ml/h)

tests.description: Initial screen differs across devices: Alaris=LANGUAGE_SELECT, B.Braun=STARTUP, Graseby=RATE_ENTRY
tests.dfuRef: Alaris GP 1000DF §2.1; B. Braun IFU §Startup; Graseby Manual §Operating Sequence
tests.expected: AG: LANGUAGE_SELECT, BB: STARTUP, GR: RATE_ENTRY — each reflects device UX design philosophy
